name: add_text_overlay
description: Render text on top of an image. Control font, size, color, alignment, padding, and position. Use base64 encoding (txt64 parameter) for text containing special characters or spaces.

parameters.name: txt
parameters.description: The text string to render. Use txt64 for base64-encoded text with special chars.

parameters.name: txt-font
parameters.description: Font family name. Supports Google Fonts.

parameters.name: txt-pad
parameters.description: Padding around the text in pixels.

parameters.name: txt-fit
parameters.description: How text fits in the image: max (scales down to fit).

body.note: Returns the image with text overlay rendered directly. Content-Type reflects the output format.
